achievements.title: Warning: Use MelonDS Core!
achievements.description: Must use MelonDS core for this set! The DeSmuME core tries to emulate the paddle controller attachment, making control of the game impossible
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: It's Fever Time!
achievements.description: Clear a Round and enter Fever Time
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: All Right! Bingo!
achievements.description: Clear a Bingo Challenge Round and enter Bingo Fever
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Coordinated Attack
achievements.description: Clear a Two Lines Challenge Round and enter Two Lines Fever
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Aces Over Kings
achievements.description: Clear a Full House Challenge Round and enter Full House Fever
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Independence Day
achievements.description: During Full House Fever, claim the Jackpot
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: UFOwned
achievements.description: Shoot down 50 UFOs in a single Fever Time
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Treasure Magnet
achievements.description: Collect 170 bonus items in a single Fever Time
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Skilled Pilot
achievements.description: Increase your multiplier to x10 outside of Break state
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: All Systems Online
achievements.description: Power up to level 20
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Breaker
achievements.description: Chain 100 kills, temporarily boosting your score multiplier
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Crusher
achievements.description: Chain 400 kills
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Overcrusher
achievements.description: Chain 900 kills
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Black and Blue
achievements.description: Earn the Freeze bonus to stop time for the enemy, and maybe for other things...
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Dipped Strawberries
achievements.description: Earn the Change to UFO bonus, then change your equipped weapon ten times in the next ten seconds
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Chocolate Mint
achievements.description: Summon a Roulette UFO, shoot it down, and win an extra life from the Roulette
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Border Down
achievements.description: With no extra lives remaining: summon a Roulette UFO, shoot it down, and win big bonus points from the Roulette
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Spice of Life
achievements.description: Earn the All Lit bonus by lighting all the playfield lamps at once
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Careful Dismantlement
achievements.description: Earn the All Lit bonus twice in the same stage
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Recruiting Drive
achievements.description: Gain four extra lives in one continue
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Quick Draw
achievements.description: Get the Shoot UFO Quickly bonus five times in one stage
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.description: Perform the Nagoya Attack on Normal or Extreme: shoot down one or more invaders while on the brink of disaster
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Nagoya Freeze
achievements.description: In Extreme 1: begin a Nagoya Attack with no chain, then chain 80 kills before the Nagoya Attack ends. (The Freeze bonus can extend a Nagoya Attack!)
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Crab Wave
achievements.description: Without losing a life or damaging any small enemies, defeat the UFO boss on Normal before its pattern loops
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Takotime
achievements.description: Without losing a life, defeat the Octopus boss on Normal or Extreme before it regains its broken armor
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Massive Damage
achievements.description: Defeat the Crab boss while its shield is active on the lower screen
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Ink Fast
achievements.description: Without losing a life, defeat the Squid boss on Normal or Extreme before it leaves the screen
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: None Shall Pass
achievements.description: Without losing a life, defeat the final boss on Normal or Extreme without letting a single enemy reach the bottom of the screen
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Distinguished Defender
achievements.description: Achieve an overall Rank S in Normal Score Attack
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Triumph Under Pressure
achievements.description: Achieve an overall Rank S in Extreme Score Attack
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Blackout Bingo
achievements.description: In a single run of Normal or Extreme Score Attack, clear the game after clearing all 12 distinct Rounds. Continuing resets progress made in the current stage, even if you retry from the boss
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Stand By! Ready?
achievements.description: Achieve a time of 13'00"00 or better in Normal Time Attack
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Don't Let the Enemy Freak You Out
achievements.description: Achieve a time of 25'00"00 or better in Extreme Time Attack
achievements.author: AaronDobbe

achievements.title: Surpasser of UFO-CO
achievements.description: Clear the Extreme course in Ranking Mode
achievements.author: AaronDobbe
